Author: TTBot#6027
Content: ✅ MichaelBell reported @urish's [USB CDC (Serial) Device](https://www.tinytapeout.com/chips/ttgf0p2/tt_um_urish_usb_cdc) as working: Works well.  Tested with a loopback on the UART, and with an external UART. I pasted a fair amount of text to check for flow control issues and didn't see any errors.

Author: rebelmike
Content: So as you might have been able to guess, I’m looking at integrating this with TinyQV. Specifically, on that one pin row version that should be able to run at the required 48MHz

Author: TTBot#6027
Content:
✅ rohanverma94 reported 's [KianV uLinux SoC](https://www.tinytapeout.com/chips/ttgf0p2/tt_um_kianV_rv32ima_uLinux_SoC) as working: Works at 30 MHz. Hooked up a USB-UART adapter:

- **Baud:** 115200
- **TX** → `ui_in[3]`
- **RX** → `uo_out[4]`
